speaker: MATT
raw_text: I would like you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also my Control Weather spell should still be active.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So nature check? Druid check? What the shit is happening check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nurture check? Nature versus nurture check? 14?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14. This is definitely not a natural wind. And as you start to get that dark feeling at the back of your head, you start noticing that some of the broken glass that is across the entirety of this beach being picked up by the wind. Swirling and congealing into a small whirlwind of broken glass and dust.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as the wind begins to pick up into two other separate, smaller shapes, but that one central funnel continues to grow and grow, like this angry, waving tornado of broken--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to flip one of the boats over as a shield and hide behind it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As a druid, would I recognize if this is an air elemental situation?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ugh, why are they always intelligence--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With advantage because it is possibly elemental-based.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two of the entities that are coming out of this wind from the sides are definitely air elemental by nature. You're very familiar with this form of physicality. You've taken on this form of physicality. However, whatever this large, strange glass-shard-encompassed entity is, it's elemental in nature but you're not sure what it is. You've not encountered something of this form, at least on this plane.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, and you are flung 40 feet in a random direction. That would be that way. So you are flung this far away, off the broom and prone, and you fall and hit the ground. I need you to go ahead and roll a dexterity saving throw. Actually no, because you didn't hit anything else. You don't need to do that. So this is going to be straight fall damage. It's an additional ten points of bludgeoning damage as you hit the ground, the wind almost knocked out of your chest, still clutching the broom in your left hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17. You got 19? Scanlan. Vax. 15 to ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. You're going to be the most useful one too. It's okay, it's power play right at the end.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: [no audio] from the last fight. [no audio]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It takes both of my beast-shaping forms to go elemental.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, I did that too, except I went Into the Woods.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Swirling forward, the giant maelstrom, its speed rapid-fast, this torrent of razor-sharp glass bits spirals forward and threatens to engulf both Percy and Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Guess I should have gone higher.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's going to mock my cover, isn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it moves around it. Unfortunately, a [no audio] like this can swirl through the small spaces. All right, so we have that. It's going to go ahead and attempt a Whirlwind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So I need both Vex and Percy to roll a strength saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, this is not a ranged attack on any level, I can't counter because it's not a ranged attack. Okay! This is just going to suck. Ah! Well, that's nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So Percy. You go ahead and take ten points of piercing damage as the glass shards go splitting towards you, jamming into your exposed skin. You get underneath the boat and it just gives you enough cover to minimize the damage. You, however, up above. The wind picks up and swirls around you. You're losing control of the broom. You take 20 points of piercing damage in the center of this cyclone of death.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You fire, and the dagger gets thrown. The dagger passes through her form. Your bullet has no effect. You watch as Ripley smiles and lowers her head. Both her and the figure that were standing vanish from sight. There's a streak of bright light from the distance as a small beam hits the center and detonates in a small fireball, which then causes the ground to suddenly rumble and (explosion) erupt in an explosion of white light and force. Everybody but Percival, for a moment, you are tossed with the blast of a hundred hammers across your body and face. Your vision is faded as you hear the sound of thunder but inches from your ear. Numbness takes over your form. I need all of you to roll a dexterity saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Attack her right now, and we'll discuss terms. I'm not actually sure I could double it, but I could definitely make it worth your while right now. It would be hilarious. She's awful!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, are they moving behind you? Do you know? You can't see. They really don't like you. Do they know what you did to my family? Do they have any idea what you do to the people that you stay with?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're talking, she cuts through your voice to him and says, "Don't worry, Percy. Our toys have already made the rounds. I sold a couple in Vasselheim and a few more in Ank'harel, partially because I needed the money, but also because he told me it would drive you mad."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We're looking at six and the instructions for creation to two other seemingly very curious and up-and-coming tinkerers like yourself."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) Well, I guess I'll have to live with that. I open fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and roll. This combat has halted, and now it's progressing again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do a-- she really pissed me off. I'm so sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to throw at her again, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm going to spend a deadeye shot on this, which is a Bad News shot with a deadeye with the Hex. By the way, she is at disadvantage on strength checks. The Hex is probably not going to do a damn thing. I don't even know why I bothered. Magic fucking cloak. With Sharpshooter. I am so nervous. Natural fucking 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's your attack. Roll your attack.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Everybody sees everybody right now. I need you all to roll initiative. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the ringing subsides from the blast, you all were thrown dozens of feet from your current placement, most of you onto your back aside from you, Vax, and you, Grog. Actually, Trinket would have caught himself as well. You now see a giant crater in the ground with rock and rubble and shards of glass tossed around you. The trees in the center have been blasted out, and you can see a number of broken trunks and roots curved up with little bits of fire and flame burning off their edge, what little bit of burnable material still remained on some of the living trees. The smell of heavy gunpowder recently burned sits in the air as the giant cloud of smoke rises up in the center of the jungle. At this point in time, the goliath has stepped forward from the brush, as well as two other figures off to the side wielding long-barreled rifle-like weapons. There are a few other figures on this side, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And actually, you don't see that one. And Ripley steps out of the bushes from the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The opposite side. This is a heavy groove in the ground. These are the only parts of the land that still stand at normal ground height. The rest of this is a giant slope that goes into a crevasse and rises back up.

preceding_turns.text: Vegetation in that area is completely gone, and there is broken rock and glass everywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's about 20 feet deep at its deepest.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The Hex is still around, meaning you cast the spell, and it's a concentration spell. Actually, I need you to roll a concentration check on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And actually, you don't see that one. And Ripley steps out of the bushes from the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.text: All right, overweight. Don't fucking fail me now. That's all right.
